name: Manaus (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: the field of the flag; in heraldic terms, peace and integrity

description: A white (beige) field bearing the municipal coat of arms of Manaus in the centre.
history: Manaus, capital of the Brazilian state of Amazonas and gateway to the Amazon basin, has long used a flag consisting of its municipal coat of arms on a plain field. The coat of arms incorporates symbols of the rivers (the Negro and Solimões meeting nearby), the rainforest, and the city's history as the centre of the late-19th-century rubber boom.

features.symbolism: plain white field on which the municipal coat of arms is centred

features.role: coat of arms of the Municipality of Manaus
features.symbolism: the coat of arms depicts the meeting of the Negro and Solimões rivers (the Encontro das Águas), the surrounding Amazon rainforest, and other emblems associated with the city's foundation and its role as the historic capital of the rubber-boom Amazon
